en: A: I forgot to bring my pen.
I can lend you.
A: I forgot to bring my chopsticks.

ab: Ini ku adas uri, nta mari.
en: B: I don't have one either, let's go buy one.
A: Let's go buy a pen, shall we?
B: Well, I still have to buy erasers.
A: Let's go get breakfast, shall we?
B: No, I've already eaten at home.
A: I forgot to steam my lunchbox.
B: Take it to the heat!
A: I forgot to bring my lunchbox.

ab: So kiya da u psupu ta mkan hndayu mu da pa!
ch: B:那我們一起吃我的便當吧!
en: B: Then let's eat my lunch box together!

ab: Mkan su manu ka cka hidaw?
en: A: What are you having for lunch?

ab: Mpkan ku equn pnchada sapah pyasan.
ch: B:我要吃學校的營養午餐。
en: B: I want a nutritious school lunch.

ab: Mpkan su manu ka cka hidaw?
en: A: What are you having for lunch?

ab: Mnadas ku hndayu ka saya, psupu ta mkan ka cka hidaw pa!
ch: B:我今天有帶便當，我們中午一起吃吧!
en: B: I've brought a lunchbox today, let's eat together at noon!
A: Let's go play basketball, shall we?
A: Let's go play basketball, shall we?
B: Okay! Let's go.
A: Shall we go play baseball?
A: Shall we go play baseball?
B: No, I want to study.
A: Please help me with the broom.

ab: Iyaq, bqani misu ka sksik ni.
en: B: Okay, here's a broomstick for you.

ab: Dyawi ku mangal waliq ssurus (jyoking) haw?
en: A: Can you help me with the cloth?

ab: Isu ku smksik, plwani ka Ukan Kumu dmayaw isu mangal.
ch: B:我在掃地，你叫Ukan Rabay幫你拿。
en: B: I'm sweeping the floor and you ask Ukan Rabay to carry it for you.
A: Are you done sweeping?
B: I swept it.
A: Why don't you clean up?
B: I've finished cleaning up.

ab: Mrutiq bay ka dxral, hayi smurus tikuh han.
en: A: The floor is dirty, go clean it.

ab: Iyaq, hayi ku mangal waliq ssurus (jyoking).
en: B: Okay, I'll go get the cloth.

ab: Mrutiq balay ka bnlingan way, hayi smurus tikuh han.
ch: A:那個窗戶很髒，去擦一下。
en: A: That window is very dirty, go clean it.

ab: Tawa han, ini ku qdu smksik ka hini na.
ch: B:等一下，我還沒掃完這裡。
en: B: Wait a minute, I'm not done sweeping here yet.
A: What are you doing later?
B: I'm going to see my teacher.

ab: Mphuya su ka babaw malix sapah pyasan?
en: A: What do you do after school?

ab: Mptuhuy ku dangi mu musa muyas uyas ka yaku.
en: B: I'm going to sing with my friends.

ab: Mphuya babaw malix sapah pyasan ka hiya?
en: A: What's he doing after school?
B: He's going swimming.
